features.name: Backend core infrastructure
features.description: FastAPI server with 15 SQLModel tables, JWT auth, WebSocket manager, seed data, and ~40 API endpoints
features.evidence: FastAPI server starts, 15 DB tables created, seed data loads, health endpoint returns ok

features.name: B-end React frontend (full)
features.description: React 19 + Ant Design 6 frontend with login, room grid, check-in, work orders, manager dashboard, knowledge base, user management, invoices, admin sandbox
features.evidence: Login, room grid, check-in modal, work order board, manager dashboard, knowledge base, user management, invoices, admin sandbox all functional

features.name: C-end Flutter app (initial)
features.description: Flutter 3.35+ guest app with 11 pages, BLoC state management, Dio API client, WebSocket, SSE chat, GoRouter routing
features.evidence: 11 pages implemented, BLoC state management, Dio API client, WebSocket, SSE chat, GoRouter routing

features.name: AI engine (LangGraph agent + tools + guard + RAG)
features.description: LangGraph state graph with classify→chat/knowledge/action branches, 4 tools, security guard, RAG with pgvector, SSE streaming, pricing agent, audit agent
features.evidence: LangGraph state graph with 3 branches, 4 tools, security guard, RAG with pgvector, SSE streaming, pricing agent, audit agent

features.name: Users table split (guests + staff)
features.description: Split users table into guests + staff, JWT carries user_type claim, get_current_user resolves from correct table, seed data updated
features.evidence: Guest and Staff models separated, JWT carries user_type, get_current_user resolves from correct table, seed data updated

features.name: C-end navigation redesign
features.description: 9 tasks: LoginBottomSheet, AuthPrompt overlay, page-level auth states, My page, bill detail, bottom nav refactor
features.notes: 9 tasks: LoginBottomSheet, AuthPrompt overlay, page-level auth states, My page, bill detail, bottom nav refactor

features.name: UTC → 中国标准时间 全局替换
features.description: Replace all datetime.utcnow() with cst_now() across 20+ files, add +08:00 suffix to API responses, Flutter .toLocal() for display
features.evidence: 新建 utils.py (cst_now/cst_isoformat), 修改 20 个文件共 30+ 处, 后端序列化加 +08:00 后缀, Flutter 加 .toLocal(), 三端编译通过

features.name: C-end homepage redesign
features.description: Complete rewrite of home_page.dart with 5 sections: gradient banner, welcome card, hotel highlights grid, facility list, footer info
features.evidence: home_page.dart 完全重写 (498 insertions, 64 deletions), 5个区块: Banner渐变+欢迎卡片+亮点网格+设施列表+底部信息, dart analyze 0 issues

features.name: C端全页面 UI 重构 (蓝色主色调)
features.description: Full UI rewrite of all 9 C-end pages with blue #2563eb primary color, dark gradient backgrounds, service tracking timeline, scene mode logic
features.evidence: dart analyze 0 errors. 11 files重写: home_page/room_control/ai_chat/work_order/my_page/bill_detail/facility/login/change_password/bottom_nav + 删除LoginBottomSheet. 蓝色#2563eb主色调, 深色渐变背景, 服务追踪时间线, 场景模式逻辑
features.notes: 全部9个C端页面按HTML原型1:1还原, 统一蓝色主色调+深色卡片风格

features.name: Bug fixes: 用户管理住客数据 + C端首次登录改密无反应
features.description: Fix two bugs: user management page not showing guest data (role=guest→type=guest), and C-end first-login password change not responding

bugs.desc: 用户管理看不到C端住客数据
bugs.root_cause: 前端用 role=guest 查住客，后端用 type=guest 区分

bugs.desc: C端首次登录改密后点击确认没反应
bugs.root_cause: GoRouter redirect 在 LoginBottomSheet 处理改密前就跳转到 /change-password，弹窗被关闭
bugs.fix: app.dart 移除 passwordChangeRequired 自动跳转; change_password_page.dart 加 context.go('/home')

features.name: 人脸识别登录
features.description: B 端开房时录入人客人脸并匹配身份证，C 端通过刷脸+活体检测登录。使用阿里云 API 实现人脸检测/比对/活体检测/搜索，人脸数据存储在阿里云人脸库
evidence: 阿里云人脸 API 服务模块 (backend/app/aliyun/face.py)
人脸 API 路由 (backend/app/api/face.py) — detect/verify/register/search
B 端摄像头拍照组件 (frontend/src/pages/front-desk/FaceCapture.tsx)
CheckInModal 集成人脸录入 (OCR+比对+注册)
AuthBloc 支持 AuthFaceLoginRequested 事件
后端 py_compile + pytest 通过

bugs.root_cause: Stale uvicorn process on port 8000 serving old code without face router
bugs.fix: Kill all Python/uvicorn processes on port 8000 and restart cleanly

bugs.root_cause: create_face_db() never called on startup, so AddFace/SearchFace always failed
bugs.fix: Added create_face_db() to startup lifespan in main.py

upcoming.notes: Push device state changes to other clients in same room

upcoming.name: Multi-session chat history persistence
